case_title: CAVALRY INVESTMENTS LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRESIDE VS. CHARLES E. PERZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO EVIDENCE CODE 1550 TO ACCEPT A PHOTOSTATIC COPY AS THE ORIGINAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY INVESTMENTS LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRESIDE BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR NOV-01-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY INVESTMENTS LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRESIDE BANK SERVED APR-17-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERZ, CHARLES E. AKA CHARLES PEREZ

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY INVESTMENTS LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRESIDE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERZ, CHARLES E. AKA CHARLES PEREZ $14,225.98 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,879.50 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,575.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-01-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
